info.title: Project NEXUS v2 API
info.description: The complete V2 REST API for Project NEXUS. Use this standard when building federated integrations.

federationBearerAuth.description: Tenant-bound federation partner API key with the required ingest permission.

offer_id.description: Accepted offer belonging to the buyer.

shipping_option_id.description: Seller-owned option; its current server price and currency are authoritative.

shipping_method.description: Used only for zero-cost pickup or community delivery.

pickup_slot_id.description: Optional seller-owned pickup slot reserved atomically with order creation; valid only for pickup fulfilment.

loyalty_redemption_id.description: Pending redemption validated and applied atomically by the server; cannot be combined with a coupon.

wallet_refund_transaction_id.description: Present after a time-credit refund; null for cash, free, and historical orders.

listing.description: Null when a historical order outlives its deleted listing.

appeal_text.description: Visible only to the user who lodged the appeal.

listing.description: Null when the referenced historical listing no longer exists.
Null when the order references a deleted historical listing.

refund_amount.description: Null until a buyer refund is recorded, including on historical disputes.

order.description: Null only for a historical dispute whose order is unavailable.

recurrence_id.description: Stable identity exposed only for a concrete maintained V2 occurrence.

owner_email.description: Private RSS owner contact exposed only to the creator studio and administrators.

audio_url.description: HTTPS URL (HTTP is accepted only for localhost in development/testing)

data.description: The newly created voice-message record, including its participant-authorized media URL.

MessageMediaBinary.description: Private message media returned with its stored MIME type. The response is never publicly cacheable.

CspReportEnvelope.description: A legacy CSP report, Reporting API report body, or raw violation object. Unknown browser fields are accepted and ignored.

PodcastShowReference.name: showReference
PodcastShowReference.description: Show slug for GET; numeric show ID for PUT and DELETE.

post.summary: Collect a browser Content Security Policy violation
post.description: Unauthenticated browser reporting endpoint used by the platform CSP. It accepts legacy report-uri envelopes and Reporting API batches, sanitizes logged URLs to origin and path, and returns no content. Requests declaring a body larger than 32 KiB are rejected.

204.description: Report accepted, ignored, or malformed without exposing processing details

post.summary: Create or replay a marketplace order
post.description: Prices, shipping cost, inventory, coupons, and loyalty value are resolved and validated by the server. The idempotency key is scoped to the authenticated buyer and tenant.

201.description: Order created, settled, or safely replayed

403.description: Marketplace unavailable or purchase prohibited

422.description: Invalid, unavailable, or inconsistent checkout selection

get.summary: List reports filed by or affecting the current user

200.description: Report visible to its reporter or affected seller

403.description: User is not a report participant

404.description: Report not found

post.summary: Appeal an eligible marketplace report decision

403.description: User is not eligible to appeal this report

422.description: Report state or appeal text is invalid

get.summary: List tenant marketplace disputes for administrators

403.description: Administrator required

put.summary: Resolve a marketplace dispute and optionally refund the buyer

refund_amount.description: Buyer resolutions only; time-credit orders require a full refund.

403.description: Administrator required

409.description: Refund or resolution could not be completed safely

422.description: Resolution is invalid for the dispute or payment type

403.description: Administrator required

422.description: Report is not awaiting appeal resolution

post.summary: Upload and send a private voice message
post.description: Creates a direct voice message in one multipart request. The stored recording is private and the returned media URL is participant-authorized.

voice_message.description: A WebM, OGG, MP3, WAV, M4A, MP4, or AAC recording up to 10 MiB.

400.description: Missing, invalid, unsupported, or oversized recording

403.description: Messaging policy, block, or safeguarding restriction denied the send

404.description: Recipient not found in the current tenant

422.description: Message could not be created in its current state

get.description: Returns an attachment only to the sender, receiver, or an authorized participant in the message conversation. The response uses the stored MIME type and private no-store headers.

200.description: Private attachment bytes; Content-Type is the validated stored MIME type

Cache-Control.description: Prevents shared or local caching of private message media.

Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy.description: Restricts embedding to the same site.

403.description: Authenticated member is not a conversation participant

404.description: Message, attachment, or private file not found

get.description: Returns a voice recording only to the sender, receiver, or an authorized participant in the message conversation. The response uses the detected MIME type and private no-store headers.

200.description: Private recording bytes; Content-Type is detected from the stored file

Cache-Control.description: Prevents shared or local caching of private message media.

Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy.description: Restricts embedding to the same site.

403.description: Authenticated member is not a conversation participant

404.description: Message or private recording not found
